Amber Waves makes a documentary about Dirk Diggler, which itself is based on the documentary Exhausted: John C. Holmes, the Real Story.  The bridge Dirk stands in front of is the Colfax Ave footbridge in Studio City.

title: Miss Donuts
description: Donut shop robbery. Across Sherman Way from the Donut Shop is where Rollergirl gets her revenge. The gas station on the corner is where Donnie Smith and Jim get pummeled by frogs

title: Jimmy's house
description: Near the end of the film, Sydney awaits Jimmy, played by Samuel L. Jackson, at his house.

title: Motel
description: Things take a turn for the worse when John and Clementine, played by Gwyneth Paltrow, find themselves involved in a hostage situation at a motel.  The motel is the Ace Motor Lodge in Reno.  The motel has changed quite a bit from how it appeared in the film and is now more dilapidated.

title: Jack's Cafe
description: The restaurant seen at the beginning and end of the film, where Sydney, played by Philip Baker Hall, meets John, played John C. Reilly, who is sitting outside the doorway, was filmed at Jack's Cafe in Sparks, Nevada, located just outside of Reno.

title: City of Long Beach: Rainbow Harbor
description: Doc follows leads on the mysterious Golden Fang boat, which is believed to bring in drugs, as well as having carried Shasta, played by Katherine Waterston, on board the last time it sailed.  The schooner is seen in darkness, off in the distance in the film.  The actual boat is the Tallship American Pride, which can be found at the Rainbow Harbor in Long Beach, California.  The boat is located at Dock 3, though it does sometimes set sail into the waters.  If you're unfamiliar with this area of Long Beach, just search for Gladstone's Restaurant (330 S Pine Ave, Long Beach, CA 90802) or Toyko Wako (310 Pine Ave, Long Beach, CA 90802) at the Long Beach Pike.  The pier and the boat are located directly behind them.

title: The Chowder Barge
description: Doc's lunch with Sauncho

title: Walker's Cafe (closed)
description: Doc and Denis have coffee

title: Doc's house
description: Doc, played by Joaquin Phoenix, lives in this house,  which is close to the above shot.  The house was mostly used for interiors in the film, but the exterior can also briefly be seen.

title: Gary's school
description: Gaspar de Portola Charter Middle

title: Billingsley Restaurant
description: Tail O' the Cock and golf course in Van Nuys

title: Election office.

title: Fat Bernie's pinball arcade
description:
Gary opens his own store, Fat Bernie's, selling waterbeds. Later in the film, Gary re-brands his business as the Pinball Palace, using the same location. The actual storefront can be found in Chatsworth.
Alana follows Gary to the back of the store, as she jealously watches him take interest in another girl.

title: El Portal Theater
description: Theater at end

title: Mikado Hotel
description: Japanese restaurant
The street scenes for the waterbed store were filmed along a stretch of Devonshire Street in Chatsworth known as the West End Arts District

title: Police station when Gary is arrested
Gary and Alana run from "police station"
Gary's waterbed business
description: After Alana gets an advertisement on the radio for Gary's water bed business, sales pick up as they start shipping out numerous orders. They load a truck from this location in Studio City. This is just behind Ventura Blvd, at the rear alley near Laurel Terrace Dr. This is also where the film's poster image was shot, with Alana and Gary standing in front of a car, facing the camera

title: Baseball field dugout
description: Alana sits with her sister at this baseball field dugout at the Van Nuys/Sherman Oaks Recreation Center, where she questions if its odd she hangs out with Gary.

title: Church of the Chimes in Sherman Oaks
description: Alana auditions for Jack Holden, played by Sean Penn (reciting dialogue from the film Breezy), inside the Church of the Chimes in Sherman Oaks. The scene is only shown from interior views in the film.

title: Victory Blvd & Lindley Ave
description: As the gas crisis takes hold, Gary runs past a line of cars waiting to fuel up near the intersection of Victory Blvd and Lindley Ave in Tarzana, overlooking the L.A. River.

title: Signal Gasoline
description: The camera follows him running up to the gas station, which is known as Signal Gasoline in the film. In reality, it's not a gas station at all, rather a mechanic's shop and smog check station.

title: Jon Peters' house
description:
The eccentric Jon Peters, played by Bradley Cooper, lives at this home in Encino, where Alana and Gary deliver a water bed.
While the home is located on a public road, it sits at the top of a long driveway up a dead end hillside and is not really visible from the street. There are additional views around the property available online via old real estate listings.

The actual winding road seen in the film is Palo Drive in Tarzana, near Rosita Street. This is where Gary smashes up Jon Peters' car, only to realize their truck has run out of gas, forcing Alana to coast down a series of hills, back down to the gas station. Here is the curve they are seen taking in the film. The house in the background behind the trees and shrubs appeared in the film Once Upon A Time In Hollywood for the back yard scenes of Sharon Tate and Roman Polanskia's home.

Alana says in the film if she can make the light at Ventura, she can make a right and get them to the gas station. This is again geographically accurate, as the truck is seen turning at the intersection of Genesta Ave and Ventura Blvd, which turning right does indeed put you about one block from the gas station used in the film.

title: Encino Post Office
description: Afterwards, Alana sits on this curb in front of the Encino Post Office. Jon Peters walks by and throws a garbage can through the front window of the store next to it, before turning around to flirt with some women walking past. The real property does provide mail services, but is not a post office.

title: Bryson Apartments
description: Prologue apartment

title: Fox Fire Room
description: Quiz Kid Donnie's bar

title: Magnolia Boulevard
description: The rain suddenly clears as Aimee Mann's Wise Up" draws to a close
latitude: and many of the characters' lives intersect at a crossroads - Donnie realizes what he's done and does a-u-turn -supposedly 'Magnolia Boulevard' (naturally) is actually the junction of Laurel Canyon Boulevard and Victory Boulevard in North Hollywood"

description: Officer Jim approaches the corner of this building, when shots are fired. He then slides down this embankment on the side of the building. As Jim is disoriented in the rain, a kid approaches and steals his gun, running up the stairs to escape undetected. While there are still stairs up to the street at the location, they have been remodeled since filming. The police arrive to assist in the search for the gun, with the L.A. river and overpass visible next to the building.

title: Pharmacy
description: Linda, played by Julianne Moore, gets upset with a pharmacist after he insinuates she may be abusing the medications.  These scenes were filed at the A to Z Pharmacy in North Hollywood, although it is only seen from interior views in the film.

title: Hotel in Valencia
description: Frank T.J. Mackey, played by Tom Cruise, gives his memorable seminar inside this hotel in Valencia. The hotel is only featured from interior views in the film. The same hotel appears in the films Twilight and Little Miss Sunshine, as well as numerous TV shows, including CSI: Crime Scene Investigation, CSI: New York, NCIS, Big Love, Las Vegas, The Unit, Make It or Break It, and more.

title: Apartment in North Hills
description: Officer Jim Kurring, played by John C. Reilly, investigates a crime scene at this apartment complex in North Hills.  As he walks back to his police car, he is approached by a young boy.

There is another coincidence scene in which an attempted suicide becomes an accidental homicide.  That scene was actually a composite of a couple different locations. The rooftop shot was done in Hollywood, with both the Griffith Observatory and the Hollywood sign visible in the distance. Also visible is the top of the North Kingsley Apartments, which puts the roof at Hollywood Blvd, facing north up N Kingley Dr. It still looks pretty much the same as it did in the film.

In the opening coincidences sequence, a man is scuba diving and gets accidentally picked up out of the water by an aeriel firefighting plane. These scenes were filmed at Big Bear Lake in California. This photo of the general area was kindly provided to us courtesy of Christian Hernandez.

title: Liquor store
description: Early in the film, Quiz Kid Donnie Smith, played by William H. Macy, crashes his car into this liquor store in Winnetka.  The same liquor store also appeared in Kevin Smith's Jay And Silent Bob Strike Back and The Smashing Pumpkins music video for 1979

title: Howard Sommerville's house
description: By order of Lockjaw, Avanti tracks down Sommerville and kidnaps him from his home. Two boys look on and, when the coast is clear, run into the house to send out a distress signal.

title: The Sisters of the Brave Beaver compound
address: La Purisima Mission State Historic Park
description: The Sisters of the Brave Beaver semi-reluctantly welcome Willa and Deandra into their compound as the two attempt to hide out from Lockjaw and his men. Unfortunately, it isn't long before he finds them. Lockjaw captures Willa and takes her to the sisters' chapel to conduct a paternity test.

title: Murphy's Market
description: On a payphone outside of Murphy's Market, Bob desperately tries to secure a meeting location from the resistance, but he can't remember the series of code words needed to prove his allegiance.

title: Welcome to Anza-Borrego Desert State Park Sign
description: The film's climactic car chase through the rolling hills of the Anza-Borrego Desert ends atop the "Texas Dip." Willa slams on her breaks just out of view of Tim, a member of the Christmas Adventurer's Club, who is pursuing her. Fleeing the parked car to take cover with a gun next to the state park sign, Willa watches on in defense as Tim barrels up the hill and smashes into the car.

title: Eureka High School
description: Willa attends her high school dance with some friends. While in the bathroom, Deandra approaches Willa and urges her to escape because troops are on their way to the school to find and capture her. The two barely escape the building before Lockjaw and his men descend.

title: Sensei's apartment
description: Sensei's wife works on the first floor of this building at the Genesis Perfumeria. Above the perfumeria is an extensive network of apartments the couple uses to hide migrants.

title: Sacramento County Courthouse (Sacramento Historic Landmark)
description: Pat and Perfidia walk into the County Courthouse to plant a second bomb. While inside the building, Lockjaw catches Perfidia setting up the device in a bathroom stall and coerces her to sleep with him.

title: County Administration Building
description: Mae West plants a bomb in the County Administration Building. Pat and Perfidia are also planting a bomb in a separate building. In the film, Pat says they are three blocks away from each other, when in reality they are right across the street.

title: Parking lot
description: Lockjaw spies on Perfidia through his binoculars as she ties up two security guards in a parking lot.

title: Westward Bank Explosion
description: The French 75 cause an explosion at "Westward Bank" in a brief clip during a montage of the group's aggressive revolutionary tactics. The explosion was created through practical effects due to the building's uninhabited status. Behind the bank is Improv Alley, which was featured during the chase sequence through Downtown Sacramento.

title: Via de la Amistad
description: The opening shot of One Battle After Another features Perfidia Beverly Hills walking across an overpass looking down at Otay Mesa Detention Center. The real Otay Mesa sits under 3 miles away.

title: Parking garage
description: After their van crashes while fleeing police officers, several members of the French 75 take off running on foot. In an attempt to dodge several cop cars, Perfidia runs down an alley and into a parking garage. This chase is filmed from an overhead shot on Jazz Alley.

title: Tower Bridge
description: A car carrying Deandra and several other members of the French 75 is seen driving across Tower Bridge, leaving Sacramento, as a squad of police cars drive in the opposite direction into the city.

title: Eckhart Auto Body

Barry's toilet-plunger business
Punch-Drunk Love

description: Restaurant where Barry beats up the bathroom

title: Royal Hawaiian Hotel
description: Hotel where Barry meets up with Lena

title: USS Hornet- Sea, Air and Space Museum
description: This is the Navy vessel Freddie works on in the opening scene of "The Master."

title: USS Potomac
description: Freddie sneaks onto Lancaster Dodd's ship while docked in San Francisco.

title: Hillside Elementary School
description: The interior shot of Lancaster Dodd's London school at the end of "The Master" was filmed here. Freddie speaks to Dodd, who is sitting at a wooden desk in front of large floor-to-ceiling windows.

title: Doris's house
description: Freddie is seen visiting his sweetheart, Doris, at this house in Crockett, California.  The house has since received a paint job.

title: Alden Park
description: Freddie and Doris sit on this park bench.

title: Admiral's Mansion
description: Lancaster Dodd's house can be a bit tricky to find, which we'll attempt to better pinpoint.  The house is known as the Captain's Mansion, a former event space on Mare Island in Vallejo, California.  The first challenge is that many houses spanning several blocks on this street look almost identical and are used for similar purposes.  There are subtle differences from house to house, however, be it minor architectural variations, trees and shrubs, views in the background, etc., which do allow for identifying the exact home from the film, To get exactly to The Master house, make sure you arrive at the intersection of Walnut Ave and 8th St on Mare Island and you'll successfully find house, which has the number 822 on the front steps.

title: Daniel's mansion
description: Greystone Mansion & Gardens: The Doheny Estate.

title: Unnamed London Restaurant
description: Original location of the restaurant Wild Honey in 2017 during filming

title: Hotel Victoria
address: Station Rd, Robin Hood's Bay, Whitby YO22 4RL
